ques: Find information on Apple website, and tell me the device weight of Apple Vision Pro and list 5 Built-in Apps it supports.
answer: Apple Vision Pro device weight is 26.4–28.2 ounces (750–800 grams) — includes Light Seal and counterbalanced Dual Knit Band, varies by configuration; separate battery weighs 353 grams. 5 built-in apps it supports: Safari, Photos, Music, Mail, and Messages.
